seed_expert_discoveries.project: Abacus AI Agent with long-term memory brain
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Long-running agent with self-correcting long-term memory boosts Fable-5 performance by 200%, enabling persistent recall across sessions for super-intelligence capabilities.
Using coding agents with codebase + traces to iteratively build, run, and refine evals (via Harbor) reduces manual effort while keeping human-in-the-loop for direction and review.

seed_expert_discoveries.project: Open source vs closed AI trends
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Open-source AI sees 20% monthly performance gains and 50% cost drops; closed AI sees 10% gains but 20% cost increases, signaling open-source dominance.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Memory framework for personal AI agents using lifecycle roles (Structure, Expansion, Evolution, Deployment) without vector DB or cloud dependency; traceable governance substrate.

global_discoveries.project: Agent memory projects for coding agents
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Multiple open-source approaches: codebase structure memory, hybrid search retrieval, workspace context persistence, Markdown knowledge bases, and cross-vendor handoff continuity.
Parallel execution for independent steps in multi-agent systems dramatically reduces latency (e.g., 40 sequential calls from 5min to <15s) by avoiding unnecessary sequential waits.

near_misses.project: CXL memory pooling for scale-up AI
near_misses.technical_takeaway: Proposes CXL-based composable memory fabric for LLM KV cache and state beyond accelerator HBM, separating memory semantics from interconnect fabrics.
near_misses.reason: Conceptual architecture discussion without new repo, benchmark, or implementation details.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: 4-tier memory (Working, Episodic, Semantic, Organizational) with Context Broker for dynamic assembly and ACLs to manage context bloat and permissions.
near_misses.reason: High-level pattern overview without specific new tools, code, or empirical results.

notes: Limited high-signal technical releases in the 24h window; focused on memory and agent patterns from experts and global searches. Many posts were casual or non-AI.
